sections.title: Structure
sections.html:
Structure[]

The main hall consists of ten components that are spilt into seven stages of construction.

Stage Section Sawn Log Quarried Stone Nails Clay Iron Fittings Lock Hinge
Stage 1 Main Hall, Door 1 - 2 - 1 1 2
Stage 2 Main Hall, Foundation 4 30 - - - - -
Stage 3 Main Hall, Floor - 6 - - - - -
Main Hall, Wall Framing 16 - 20 - - - -
Stage 4 Main Hall, 1st Floor Walls 4 - 16 8 - - -
Main Hall, 2nd Floor Supports 6 - 10 - - - -
Stage 5 Main Hall, Roof Framing 10 - - - - - -
Main Hall, 2nd Floor Walls 4 - 12 8 - - -
Stage 6 Main Hall, Roof 2 - 25 - - - -
Stage 7 Main Hall, Cellar (optional) † 8 50 - - - - -
Total 55 86 85 16 1 1 2

† For a full overview of the Cellar, its furnishings, bugs, etc. see Cellar
